name: Kurukshetra War
desc: The pivotal battle between Dharma and Adharma that concluded the Dvapara Yuga.

name: Ravana's Fall
desc: The journey of the ideal king and his allies to destroy the ten-headed demon lord.

name: Vishnu's Descent
desc: The ten primary incarnations of Vishnu across all four cosmic ages.

name: The Seven Immortals
desc: Beings granted eternal life who continue to walk the earth through the Kali Yuga.
